---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for an improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
Describe the problem you're trying to solve (what makes the current flow hard?).

## Proposed solution
How should lodestone work to solve it?

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Use case
Who would benefit? (single-account user, cross-account workflow, measurement, integration, etc.)

## Additional context
Links to related issues, research docs, or community discussions.
